content:
INTELLIGENCE BRIEFING — Wed, 18 Feb 2026 01:11:48 GMT
Overall Threat Level: CRITICAL
Total Events: 226 | Critical: 70 | High: 18 | Medium: 19 | Low: 119

CRITICAL ALERTS:
  [AFRICA] US Launches Three More Airstrikes in Somalia - News From Antiwar . com (GDELT)
  [NUCLEAR] US reveals new details of alleged Chinese nuclear test (GDELT)
  [MIDDLE EAST] U . S . Negotiators in Geneva Hold Talks on Iran Nuclear Program , Russia - Ukraine War (GDELT)
  [GLOBAL] US strikes three more alleged drug boats kill 11 people (GDELT)
  [MIDDLE EAST] Iran sees  new window  in nuclear talks , but strait drill underscores complexity (GDELT)

REGIONAL ASSESSMENT:
  Middle East (52 events, 24 critical, 5 high):
    - U . S . Negotiators in Geneva Hold Talks on Iran Nuclear Program , Russia - Ukraine War
    - Iran sees  new window  in nuclear talks , but strait drill underscores complexity
    - Iran not to abandon peaceful nuclear technology , says president
  Ukraine/Russia (10 events, 4 critical, 2 high):
    - Trump Said He’d End the War in Ukraine in a Day. It’s Harder Than He Thought.
    - Facing a demographic catastrophe, Ukraine is paying for troops to freeze their sperm
    - Kim Jong Un moves families of Ukraine war dead into new housing complex
  Europe (35 events, 8 critical, 5 high):
    - Siemens Simcenter Femap and Nastran
    - Austrian man faces terror charges over Taylor Swift concert attack plot
    - How an undercover cop foiled an IS plot to massacre Britain’s Jews – podcast
  Indo-Pacific (34 events, 6 critical, 1 high):
    - US says 11 people killed in latest strikes on alleged drug boats
    - US to send more missile launchers to the Philippines despite China’s alarm
    - Delta Electronics ASDA-Soft
  United States (7 events, 3 critical, 1 high):
    - US military says it killed 11 people in strikes on three alleged drug boats
    - Eleven killed in multiple strikes on alleged drug boats, US military says
    - Inside the Strike: The US Munition That Hit a Residential Building in Venezuela
  Global (60 events, 9 critical, 2 high):
    - US strikes three more alleged drug boats kill 11 people
    - Police identify suspect in Rhode Island ice rink shooting
    - Saudi Arabia buys C-27 cargo planes fitted for armed maritime patrols

Sources: GDELT, Al Jazeera, NYT World, The Guardian, BBC World, Middle East Eye, Breaking Defense, Defense News, BBC Africa, CISA Advisories, War on the Rocks, BBC Europe, BBC Asia, NK News, BBC Middle East, Bellingcat, BBC Latin America, The Diplomat
